name: Gan Huai
page_title: Gan Huai 甘瑰 [Wu] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes: Gan Huai was Gan Ning’s son. Some time after Gan Ning died of illness Gan Huai was exiled from Wu to Kuaiji, on account of some offense, and died soon after. History does not mention him as having attained rank, which is a little unusual under Sun Quan who usually took care of his officer’s children. This would seem even more likely given Sun Quan’s admiration of Gan Ning. Perhaps the trouble caused by Gan Huai was extensive enough that he couldn’t be retained in the government, or perhaps Sun Quan was disappointed with the way in which he compared to his father.

full_text:
Gan Huai 甘瑰
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gan Huai (甘瑰)was born in Nanyang. Exiled from Wu some time after his father’s death for causing trouble. Gan Huai was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.

BiographyHistoric (Confirmed)
Gan Huai was Gan Ning’s son. Some time after Gan Ning died of illness Gan Huai was exiled from Wu to Kuaiji, on account of some offense, and died soon after. History does not mention him as having attained rank, which is a little unusual under Sun Quan who usually took care of his officer’s children. This would seem even more likely given Sun Quan’s admiration of Gan Ning. Perhaps the trouble caused by Gan Huai was extensive enough that he couldn’t be retained in the government, or perhaps Sun Quan was disappointed with the way in which he compared to his father.
